mapper.insert: INSERT INTO setmeal_dish (setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies) VALUES (#{setmealId}, #{dishId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{copies})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM setmeal_dish WHERE setmeal_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM setmeal_dish sd LEFT JOIN dish d ON sd.dish_id = d.id WHERE sd.setmeal_id = #{setmealId} AND d.status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE setmeal SET status = 0 WHERE id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT setmeal_id FROM setmeal_dish WHERE dish_id = #{dishId} )
